canonical_commands.all_models_reference_run: python -m src.main --dataset-root data --task all --epochs 3 --batch-size 32 --transfer-model resnet50 --output-dir results/real_run
canonical_commands.tuned_transfer_reference_run: python -m src.main --dataset-root data --task transfer --epochs 3 --batch-size 32 --transfer-model resnet50 --output-dir results/real_run_tuned_fast
